RatingScheme.title: Rating Scheme
RatingScheme.description: A rating scheme profile created by a user containing multiple rating records.

id.description: The unique document ID of the rating scheme.

name.description: Name of the rating scheme (e.g. 'Blues Rating Scheme').

userId.description: The creator or owner of this scheme.

isShared.description: Whether the scheme is publicly shared for read access.

allowEdit.description: Whether anyone can edit the records in this scheme if it is shared.

effectiveAsOf.description: The date when the current version of the rating scheme is effective as of (YYYYMMDD or YYYY-MM-DD).

proposedEffectiveDateFuture.description: Proposed effective date for the future version of the rating scheme.

proposedEffectiveDateAlternate.description: Proposed effective date for the alternate version of the rating scheme.

createdAt.description: Firestore server timestamp representing the creation time.

updatedAt.description: Firestore server timestamp representing the last update time.

ArmyRatingRecord.title: Army Rating Record
ArmyRatingRecord.description: An individual rating record within a scheme representing a soldier and their rating chain links.

id.description: The unique ID of the rating record.

schemeId.description: The ID of the parent RatingScheme.

element.description: Section or element of the soldier (e.g. Brass, Woodwinds).

rank.description: Rank of the soldier (e.g. MAJ, SGM, SFC).

name.description: The name of the soldier (Last, First).

raterId.description: The document ID of the rater.

seniorRaterId.description: The document ID of the senior rater.

seniorRaterEffectiveDate.description: Effective date of the senior rater (YYYY-MM-DD).

reviewerId.description: The document ID of the reviewer.

submissionType.description: Submission Type (e.g., ANN, COR, CTR, EXANN).

role.description: Principal Duty Title / Role in the organization.

keyLeaderTitle.description: Custom title for key leader positions.

version.description: Version profile draft (e.g., current, future, alternate).

isLateMode.description: Flag if record is in 'Late' mode for NCOER.

priorThru.description: Prior Thru Date for late mode (YYYY-MM-DD).

priorDueHqda.description: Prior Due to HQDA Date for late mode (YYYY-MM-DD).

isCustomStatus.description: Flag if the status is a custom user-defined string.

updatedAt.description: Firestore server timestamp representing the last update time.

/schemes/{schemeId}.description: Collection of rating schemes created by users.

/records/{recordId}.description: Collection of individual rating records within rating schemes.
